name: Information security policy
description: Make sure the organization has official documents that explain how information security is carried out. This document needs to be approved by leadership, shared with the entire team, and checked regularly so that it remains relevant to business developments.

roleTranslations.bod: Mr/Mrs Directors, make sure there is an annual budget for audits and creating security policies, so that our organization is not fined by regulators of billions of Rupiah if a data leak occurs.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: Bro, make sure you implement password and server access rules according to the approved policy document. Don't have a server that runs using the default password.
roleTranslations.legal: Ensure that an obligation to comply with this security policy clause is included in every new employee employment contract and third-party vendor collaboration agreement.

implementationTips: Mulai dengan membuat draft kebijakan yang sederhana dan relevan dengan bisnis. Libatkan C-level untuk approval, lalu sosialisasi ke seluruh karyawan melalui email blast dan briefing. Review kebijakan minimal setahun sekali atau saat ada perubahan regulasi signifikan.
analogy: Like a compass that provides direction on a journey, a security policy provides clear guidance to the entire organization about what to protect and how.

name: Information security roles and responsibilities
description: Clearly explain who is responsible for what aspect of security. Each role must have specific tasks that are neatly recorded, so that there are no overlaps or gaps in responsibilities.
implementationTips: Buat RACI matrix yang jelas untuk setiap aspek keamanan informasi. Tetapkan CISO atau security champion. Dokumentasikan job description setiap role dan komunikasikan melalui onboarding session.
analogy: Just as a soccer team has specific positions—goalkeeper, defender, striker—everyone in the organization must know their role in maintaining information security.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information security roles and responsibilities'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information security roles and responsibilities'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Information security roles and responsibilities'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Separation of duties
description: Separate tasks that, if handled by one person, could potentially lead to a conflict of interest. For example, the person who creates the system should not be the same person who verifies its security. This helps prevent abuse of authority.

roleTranslations.bod: Sir/Madam, make sure the organizational structure prevents the accumulation of power in one person. The CFO may not hold super IT admin access. This is crucial for preventing internal fraud.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: Bro, make sure you set the role in IAM specifically. Developers cannot have product access, and database admins cannot control the application server.
roleTranslations.legal: Make sure there are no findings of violations of separation of duties as this is often a critical finding by external auditors that can result in a reprimand.

implementationTips: Identifikasi fungsi-fungsi yang berpotensi konflik (misal: developer vs deployer, buyer vs payer). Implementasi segregation of duties matrix di sistem. Lakukan review akses berkala setiap 6 bulan.
analogy: As in a restaurant, the chef who cooks is not the same as the cashier who handles the money—this separation prevents fraud and ensures quality.

name: Management responsibilities
description: Organizational leaders must actively ensure that all employees follow the established security rules. Not only making rules, but also ensuring consistent implementation.
implementationTips: Manajemen harus memberikan contoh dengan mengikuti training keamanan terlebih dahulu. Sertakan KPI keamanan dalam performance review. Adakan town hall meeting quarterly untuk update progress keamanan.
analogy: Like a team coach who not only provides strategies but also ensures that each player carries them out, management must actively encourage the implementation of information security.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Management responsibilities'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Management responsibility'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Management responsibilities'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Contact with competent authorities
description: Prepare a list of important contacts such as BSSN, police (cybercrime unit), or related regulatory agencies. This good relationship is very useful when the organization needs assistance or reports incidents.
implementationTips: Buat daftar kontak BSSAN, POLRI (unit cybercrime), dan Kominfo. Simpan dalam kontak darurat yang mudah diakses. Lakukan silaturahmi rutin minimal setahun sekali untuk membangun relasi.
analogy: Like having an emergency telephone number ready to call when a problem occurs, contact with authorities helps organizations respond appropriately to incidents.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Contacts with competent authorities'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Contact with competent authority'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Contact with competent authorities'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Contact with special interest groups
description: Join a cybersecurity professional community such as ID-SIRTII or the Indonesian CISO forum. From here, the team can get updates on the latest threats and share experiences with other practitioners.
implementationTips: Gabung dengan ID-SIRTII, MALSPINDO, atau komunitas CISO Indonesia. Aktif di forum sharing ancaman siber. Hadiri minimal 2 event keamanan informasi per tahun untuk update best practices.
analogy: Just like joining a community of doctors to stay updated on the latest treatment methods, joining a security forum helps organizations stay updated on the latest threats.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Contacts with special interest groups'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Contact with special interest groups'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Contact with special interest groups'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Threat intelligence
description: Gather information about active cyber threats, then analyze their impact on the organization. Threat intelligence helps teams prepare before an attack actually occurs.
implementationTips: Subscribe ke feed threat intelligence gratis seperti MISP atau AlienVault OTB. Tetapkan tim kecil yang bertugas menganalisis threat feed mingguan. Buat briefing bulanan tentang ancaman terbaru yang relevan dengan industri.
analogy: Just as meteorological agencies monitor the weather to predict storms, threat intelligence helps organizations anticipate attacks before they occur.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Monitor risk exposure from 'Threat intelligence' via the executive dashboard. Make sure it is aligned with the company's risk appetite.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'threat intelligence'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Threat intelligence'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information security in project management
description: Every project—regardless of type—must include information security aspects from the start of planning. Don't wait until the project is finished to think about security.
implementationTips: Tambahkan checklist keamanan di project charter setiap proyek. Libatkan tim security di kick-off meeting. Sertakan security review sebagai gate di stage-gate process proyek.
analogy: Just as seat belts must be worn in any car, information security must be part of every project, regardless of type.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information security in project management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information security in project management'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Information security in project management'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Inventory information and other related assets
description: Make a complete list of all the information assets you own: laptops, servers, databases, applications, even data in the cloud. Each asset must have a clear owner and business value.
exampleEvidence: Pemilik aset yang ditunjuk untuk setiap aset signifikan
Catatan tinjauan inventaris aset secara berkala
Output alat manajemen aset perangkat lunak
implementationTips: Mulai dengan spreadsheet sederhana: nama aset, owner, lokasi, klasifikasi, criticality. Lakukan stock opname aset IT quarterly. Gunakan tools seperti Snipe-IT jika aset sudah ratusan.
analogy: Like a table of contents in a book helps you find specific pages, an asset inventory helps an organization know what to protect and where it is located.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Inventory of information and other related assets'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Inventory of information and other related assets'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Inventory of information and other related assets'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Acceptable use of assets
description: Create clear rules about how employees can use company IT assets. For example, office laptops can be used for remote work, but not for cryptocurrency mining.
implementationTips: Buat AUP yang jelas menyebutkan apa yang boleh dan tidak boleh dilakukan dengan aset IT. Minta karyawan tanda tangan AUP saat onboarding. Sosialisasikan dengan contoh kasus pelanggaran yang sering terjadi.
analogy: Like the rules for using company vehicles—allowed for business use only, not personal vacations—IT assets also need clear usage limits.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Acceptable use of assets'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Acceptable use of assets'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Acceptable use of assets'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Return on assets
description: When employees resign or move divisions, make sure all loaned assets—laptops, system access, ID cards—are returned. Create a checklist that is integrated with HR processes.
implementationTips: Buat checklist exit clearance yang mencakup pengembalian laptop, ID card, token, dan akses sistem. Integrasikan dengan proses HR saat resign. Tetapkan timeline 1-3 hari kerja untuk pengembalian semua aset.
analogy: Like returning apartment keys at check-out, all organizational assets must be returned when employees leave or finish work.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Return on assets'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Asset recovery'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Return of assets'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information classification
description: Classify data based on its sensitivity: which can be public, which is internal, which is confidential. This classification is the basis for determining the level of protection.
implementationTips: Definisikan 3-4 level klasifikasi: Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted. Buat kriteria yang jelas untuk setiap level. Mulai klasifikasi dari data paling kritis dulu, lalu ekspansi bertahap.
analogy: Like hospital triage systems that prioritize patients based on severity, information classification helps prioritize data protection.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information classification'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information classification'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Information classification'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information labeling
description: Label or mark each document or file according to its classification. This label reminds anyone handling the level of caution required.
implementationTips: Implementasikan label digital (header/footer dokumen, email subject tag) dan fisik (stiker pada dokumen kertas). Gunakan watermark untuk dokumen confidential. Otomatisasi labeling dengan DLP jika memungkinkan.
analogy: Just as a 'fragile' label on a package reminds the courier to be careful, classification labels tell employees how to handle information.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Information labelling'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information labeling'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Information labelling'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information transfer
description: When sending data—whether via email, USB, or the cloud—use a secure method appropriate to the sensitivity of the data. Confidential data should not be sent via regular email without encryption.
implementationTips: Tetapkan metode transfer aman: SFTP untuk file besar, encrypted email untuk data sensitif, secure portal untuk sharing eksternal. Larang penggunaan personal email atau USB untuk transfer data perusahaan.
analogy: Like sending money with an anti-theft safe, transferring information requires special protection so that it is not stolen in the middle of the road.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Information transfer'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information transfer'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Transfer of information'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Access management
description: Set who can access certain information and assets. The principle: provide access only to the extent needed to carry out the task (least privilege).
implementationTips: Terapkan prinsip least privilege dari awal. Buat workflow approval untuk request akses baru. Review akses user setiap 3-6 bulan, terutama untuk sistem kritis.
analogy: Like the access card system in hotels—guests can only enter their own rooms, not other people's rooms—access should be based on need.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Access management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Access management'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Access management'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Identity management
description: Manage employee digital identities from entry to exit from the company. Including account creation, role changes, and removing access when resigning.
implementationTips: Integrasikan sistem HR dengan Active Directory untuk automate provisioning/deprovisioning. Pastikan proses join-mover-leaver berjalan lancar. Audit identitas user yang tidak aktif setiap bulan.
analogy: Just like creating a new KTP, extending it, and revoking it when moving cities, digital identity also needs to be managed from start to finish.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Identity management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Identity management'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Identity management'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Authentication information
description: Tightly manage authentication information such as passwords, tokens, or digital certificates. Require the use of strong passwords and multi-factor authentication for critical systems.
implementationTips: Wajibkan password minimal 12 karakter dengan kompleksitas. Implementasi MFA untuk semua sistem critical. Gunakan password manager enterprise. Rotasi password setiap 90 hari untuk akun privileged.
analogy: Just as ATM passwords must be kept secret and changed periodically, authentication information needs to be managed tightly to prevent misuse.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Authentication information'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Authentication information'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Authentication information'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Access rights
description: Determine each user's access rights based on their position, and routinely review whether access is still appropriate. Revoke access when no longer needed or when a user changes roles.
implementationTips: Buat prosedur formal untuk grant, modify, dan revoke access. Implementasi role-based access control (RBAC). Lakukan recertification akses quarterly untuk sistem yang mengandung data sensitif.
analogy: Like keys that must be taken back when an employee resigns, access rights must also be revoked immediately so that they are not misused.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Access rights'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Access rights'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Access rights'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information security in relations with suppliers
description: Evaluate security risks that may arise from collaboration with vendors or suppliers. Make sure the contract includes security obligations and audit rights.
implementationTips: Buat questionnaire security assessment untuk vendor baru. Sertakan klausul keamanan di kontrak. Lakukan audit atau request bukti compliance vendor sebelum onboard.
analogy: Just as you check a contractor's reputation before hiring them, a supplier's security risks should be evaluated before collaborating.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information security in supplier relationships'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information security in relations with suppliers'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Information security in relationships with suppliers'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information security management for cloud services
description: When using cloud services, understand the shared responsibility model. Configure security settings correctly and monitor cloud activity regularly.
implementationTips: Pahami shared responsibility model untuk setiap cloud provider. Konfigurasi security group dan IAM dengan benar dari awal. Enable logging dan monitoring untuk semua layanan cloud.
analogy: It's like renting a safe at a bank—you have to trust the bank to look after it, but also make sure that what you store is allowed there.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information security management for cloud services'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information security management for cloud services'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Information security management for cloud services'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information security in the IT supply chain
description: Monitor security along the IT supply chain. If any vendor becomes a weak point, the risk can spread to the organization. Diversify vendors to reduce risk.
implementationTips: Map seluruh supply chain TI dan identifikasi single point of failure. Request business continuity plan dari vendor kritis. Diversifikasi vendor untuk mengurangi risiko ketergantungan.
analogy: Just as restaurants must ensure their food suppliers are safe, organizations must ensure their IT supply chain does not become a security weak point.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information security in the IT supply chain'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information security in the IT supply chain'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Information security in the IT supply chain'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Compliance with information security policies, rules and standards
description: Routinely check whether security implementation is in accordance with established policies and standards. Create a compliance checklist and track the progress of remediation findings.
implementationTips: Buat compliance checklist berdasarkan kebijakan internal. Lakukan self-assessment berkala setiap quarter. Track remediation plan untuk temuan yang belum ditutup.
analogy: Like annual vehicle fitness tests, regular compliance reviews ensure an organization's security is still on track.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Ensure compliance with 'Compliance with information security policies, rules and standards' is monitored in audit reports. Failure could trigger regulatory sanctions.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Compliance with information security policies, rules and standards'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Compliance with information security policies, rules and standards'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Relations with the information and security community
description: Actively share threat information with other organizations via forums or ISAC. This collaboration helps all parties be better prepared to face the same threats.
implementationTips: Aktif berpartisipasi di ISAC (Information Sharing and Analysis Center) sektor industri Anda. Share anonymized threat data untuk membantu komunitas. Manfaatkan intelligence yang didapat untuk improve defense.
analogy: Just as RT systems share environmental security information with each other, security communities help organizations share threat information with each other.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Relations with the information and security community'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Relationship with the information and security community'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Relations with the information and security community'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Business continuity information security planning and preparation
description: Prepare an information security plan that supports business continuity during a crisis. Identify critical processes and determine how long the system can be down.
implementationTips: Identifikasi business process kritis dan Maximum Tolerable Downtime. Buat BCP yang mencakup skenario worst-case. Lakukan tabletop exercise minimal setahun sekali untuk uji kesiapan.
analogy: Just as fire drills train evacuations before a real disaster, continuity planning prepares an organization for a crisis.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Business continuity information security planning and preparation'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Business continuity information security planning and preparation'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Business continuity information security planning and preparation'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Initial compliance assessments and decisions
description: Identify all legal and regulatory obligations that apply to the organization, such as the PDP Law or OJK provisions. Create a compliance matrix and assign PICs for each requirement.
implementationTips: Inventory semua kewajiban hukum yang berlaku (UU PDP, PP 71/2019, dll). Buat compliance matrix dan assign PIC untuk setiap requirement. Review legal compliance saat ada regulasi baru.
analogy: Like a health check before starting a gym, an initial compliance assessment ensures the organization is ready to meet all safety obligations.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Ensure compliance with the 'Initial compliance assessment and decision' is monitored in the audit report. Failure could trigger regulatory sanctions.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Preliminary compliance assessment and decision'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Initial compliance assessment and decision'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Legal, regulatory and contractual requirements
description: Continue to monitor regulatory changes that impact information security. Subscribe to the BSSN, OJK, or legal consultant newsletter to stay updated.
implementationTips: Subscribe ke update regulasi dari OJK, Kominfo, atau BSSN. Buat legal register yang diupdate quarterly. Konsultasi dengan legal counsel untuk interpretasi requirement yang ambigu.
analogy: Like a list of traffic rules that drivers must comply with, security legal requirements must be known to organizations and adhere to.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Ensure compliance with 'Legal, regulatory and contractual requirements' is monitored in audit reports. Failure could trigger regulatory sanctions.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Legal, regulatory and contractual requirements'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review SLAs and sanctions clauses (Right to Audit & Penalty) on vendors regarding implementation of 'Legal, regulatory and contractual requirements'.

name: Immutability and disposition of recorded information
description: Protect important documents from unauthorized deletion or modification. Determine how long documents should be kept and how to destroy them safely.
implementationTips: Definisikan retention period untuk setiap jenis dokumen berdasarkan hukum dan bisnis. Implementasi automated retention di DMS. Pastikan proses disposal dilakukan dengan secure destruction.
analogy: Like important records stored in fireproof cabinets, recorded information must be protected from being lost or carelessly altered.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Permanence and disposition of information records'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Immutability and disposition of information records'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Permanence and disposition of information records'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Privacy assurance and PII protection
description: Identify personal data managed by the organization and ensure its protection in accordance with applicable privacy laws. Appoint a DPO if the volume of personal data processed is large.
implementationTips: Lakukan data mapping untuk tahu di mana PII disimpan. Implementasi privacy by design di setiap sistem baru. Tunjuk DPO jika volume PII yang diproses besar.
analogy: Like doctors who protect patient confidentiality, organizations are obliged to protect the personal data entrusted to them.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Privacy assurance and PII protection'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Privacy guarantee and PII protection'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations for 'Guarantee of privacy and protection of PII'.

name: Independent assessment of information security
description: Invite an independent party to periodically review the effectiveness of the information security program. External audits provide an objective perspective that internal teams may miss.
implementationTips: Jadwalkan audit internal minimal setahun sekali oleh tim independen. Gunakan framework audit yang recognized (ISO 27001, NIST). Tindak lanjuti temuan dengan remediation plan yang terukur.
analogy: Like a financial audit by an external accountant, an independent assessment provides an objective view of security effectiveness.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Independent assessment of information security'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Independent assessment of information security'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Independent assessment of information security'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Information security requirements in the ICT development process
description: Integrate security requirements into the IT system development process. Perform threat modeling and security reviews before new features are released.
implementationTips: Integrasikan security checkpoint di SDLC. Wajibkan threat modeling untuk setiap fitur baru. Lakukan code review dan security testing sebelum release.
analogy: Just as the foundation of a building must be strong from the start, security must be built in from the start in system development, not added later.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Information security requirements in the ICT development process'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Information security requirements in the ICT development process'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Information security requirements in the ICT development process'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Legal development and control
description: Ensure all legal aspects of security implementation have been consulted with the legal team. Including contract clauses with vendors and internal policies that impact employees.
implementationTips: Review semua kontrak dan perjanjian dari aspek keamanan informasi. Pastikan ada klausul right-to-audit untuk vendor. Konsultasi legal sebelum implementasi kontrol yang berdampak ke karyawan.
analogy: Just like building permits must be met before building, legal aspects must be controlled before implementing the system.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Legal development and control'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Legal development and control'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Legal development and control'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Management of intellectual property rights
description: Manage software licenses and intellectual property rights neatly. Use tools for tracking usage and make sure there is no pirated software installed.
implementationTips: Inventory semua software yang digunakan dan cek lisensinya. Gunakan software asset management tool untuk track license compliance. Lakukan audit software internal setiap 6 bulan.
analogy: Like respecting musicians' copyrights by purchasing original songs, organizations must respect the licenses of the software used.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Intellectual property rights management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Intellectual property rights management'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Intellectual property rights management'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

name: Record protection
description: Protect important records such as system logs, CCTV, or backup data from unauthorized access or modification. Store in a safe and controlled place.
implementationTips: Identifikasi records yang wajib dilindungi berdasarkan hukum. Implementasi access control dan encryption untuk records sensitif. Buat backup terpisah untuk records penting.

implementationTips: Lakukan background check sesuai hukum ketenagakerjaan: cek identitas, pendidikan, dan riwayat kerja. Untuk posisi sensitif, tambah cek kriminal dan kredit. Dokumentasikan hasil screening dan simpan secara confidential.

analogy: Just as a rental contract states the rules for using the property, an employment contract should state information security obligations.

implementationTips: Buat program awareness berlapis: onboarding training untuk karyawan baru, monthly newsletter, annual refresher, dan targeted training untuk role spesifik. Ukur efektivitas dengan phishing simulation.

implementationTips: Definisikan gradasi sanksi sesuai severity pelanggaran: warning pertama, kedua, hingga PHD. Sosialisasikan konsekuensi di employee handbook. Pastikan proses disipliner sesuai hukum ketenagakerjaan.

description: Remind employees who will resign about their confidentiality obligations which still apply even if they no longer work for the company. For critical positions, consider garden leave.
implementationTips: Sertakan klausa non-disclosure yang tetap berlaku setelah resign. Lakukan exit interview yang mengingatkan kewajiban kerahasiaan. Untuk posisi kritis, pertimbangkan garden leave.
analogy: Like the obligation to maintain company secrets even after resigning, security responsibilities do not end when employees leave.

description: Request the signature of a confidentiality agreement (NDA) from all parties who will access sensitive information: employees, contractors, even visitors who enter restricted areas.

implementationTips: Buat WFH policy yang mencakup: wajib VPN, larangan pakai public WiFi untuk kerja, secure home network setup, dan clear desk policy di rumah. Provide security guidelines untuk setup home office.

implementationTips: Identifikasi dan map physical boundary: pagar, dinding, atau barrier lainnya. Install fencing untuk area kritis. Pastikan tidak ada blind spot yang bisa dilewati tanpa terdeteksi.

implementationTips: Implementasi access card atau biometric di semua entry point. Buat visitor management system dengan log buku tamu dan escort policy. Review access log secara berkala.
analogy: Just as security in a building checks IDs before allowing entry, physical access controls filter who can enter.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Physical entries'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

analogy: Like earthquake-resistant buildings in vulnerable zones, facilities must be protected from environmental and physical threats.

implementationTips: Buat emergency response plan yang mencakup: evakuasi, assembly point, emergency contact. Install emergency lighting dan exit sign. Lakukan drill minimal 2 kali setahun.

implementationTips: Buat checklist inspeksi facility: structural integrity, fire safety, access control functionality. Lakukan inspeksi berkala: monthly untuk area kritis, quarterly untuk area lain. Track temuan dan remediation.

implementationTips: Buat relocation plan yang mencakup: packing aman, transport dengan kendaraan secure, setup security di lokasi baru. Pastikan tidak ada downtime untuk security monitoring selama transisi.

implementationTips: Install EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) di semua device. Wajibkan full disk encryption. Enable remote wipe capability untuk mobile device. Patch OS dan aplikasi secara berkala.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'End user devices'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

description: Strictly manage privileged accounts (admin, root). Use a PAM (Privileged Access Management) solution and require approval for each use.
implementationTips: Implementasi PAM solution untuk manage privileged account. Wajibkan approval untuk setiap penggunaan privileged access. Record session privileged access untuk audit trail.
analogy: Like a master key that is only held by the head of security, admin rights must be limited so that they are not misused.

implementationTips: Implementasi access control list (ACL) berdasarkan need-to-know. Review permission secara berkala. Remove default account atau guest access yang tidak diperlukan.

implementationTips: Gunakan version control system (Git) dengan branch protection. Batasi access ke production code. Require code review dan approval sebelum merge ke main branch.
analogy: Like Coca-Cola's secret recipe that only a few people know, access to the source code must be restricted.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Access to source code'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

implementationTips: Implementasi MFA untuk semua sistem. Gunakan passwordless authentication jika memungkinkan. Monitor failed login attempt untuk deteksi brute force attack.
analogy: Like a fingerprint that is unique to each person, authentication ensures that only valid identities can log in.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Secure authentication'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Capacity management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

implementationTips: Install antivirus/anti-malware di semua endpoint dan server. Update signature daily. Enable real-time scanning. Lakukan scan full system weekly. Educate user untuk tidak click suspicious link.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Protection against malware'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Protection against malware'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

implementationTips: Run vulnerability scan monthly untuk semua sistem. Prioritize remediation berdasarkan risk score. Patch critical vulnerability dalam 7 hari. Retest setelah patch untuk verify fix.

description: Create secure data deletion procedures: overwrite for HDD, crypto-shred for SSD. Use a certified vendor for disposal of large quantities of media.
implementationTips: Buat prosedur secure deletion: overwrite untuk HDD, crypto-shred untuk SSD. Document proses deletion dan buat destruction certificate. Gunakan third-party certified disposal vendor untuk media besar.

name: Data masking
description: Implement data masking to hide sensitive information: use scramble or substitute techniques for testing data, and dynamic data masking for production queries.
implementationTips: Implementasi data masking untuk testing environment: scramble atau substitute sensitive data. Gunakan dynamic data masking untuk production query. Mask PII, financial data, dan confidential information.
analogy: Like the KTP number which is only partially displayed (XXX-XXX-1234), masking data hides sensitive information.

implementationTips: Deploy DLP solution untuk monitor dan block unauthorized data transfer. Define policy untuk classified data. Monitor email, web upload, dan USB transfer. Alert dan block jika ada violation.
analogy: Like an alarm in a shop that sounds if goods are taken out without payment, DLP detects data that has been left without permission.

name: Information backup
description: Routine data backup follows the 3-2-1 rule: 3 copies, 2 types of media, 1 offsite. Test restore quarterly to ensure the backup can be restored.
implementationTips: Implementasi 3-2-1 backup rule: 3 copies, 2 media types, 1 offsite. Test restore quarterly untuk verify backup integrity. Encrypt backup data. Monitor backup job daily.
analogy: Like a spare tire that is ready to be used when the main tire gets punctured, backup ensures that data can be restored when a problem occurs.

implementationTips: Setup redundant server di lokasi berbeda. Implementasi load balancing untuk distribute traffic. Test failover secara berkala. Pastikan RPO dan RTO sesuai business requirement.

implementationTips: Enable logging untuk semua sistem critical: OS, aplikasi, network device. Centralize log ke SIEM. Retain log minimal 1 tahun. Monitor log untuk anomali daily.

implementationTips: Implementasi monitoring untuk deteksi anomali: unusual login time, volume data access tinggi, privilege escalation. Setup alert untuk suspicious activity. Review alert daily oleh SOC team.

implementationTips: Setup NTP server internal yang sync ke sumber waktu terpercaya. Pastikan semua sistem sync ke NTP server yang sama. Monitor clock drift dan alert jika ada deviasi signifikan.
analogy: Just as all clocks at an airport must be in sync for flight schedules, system time must be consistent for accurate analysis.
